issues.issue: The agent got stuck in a prolonged execution loop (24 tool calls, 20675s duration) resulting in a complete timeout and no output.
issues.suggestion: Implement a strict cap on the maximum number of tool calls (e.g., max 5-7 calls per agent) and instruct the agent to synthesize whatever data it has gathered if it approaches the time/token limit.

pharma.summary: The agent completely failed to generate a report, resulting in a timeout error. The execution log indicates excessive tool usage (24 calls) which likely caused an infinite loop or infrastructure hang, requiring strict limits on data-gathering iterations.
